<rdf:RDF 
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#" 
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#" 
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#" 
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#" 
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FacultyMember"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Researcher"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Administrator"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Professor"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Dean">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Academician">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="ResearchArea">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FieldOfStudy"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="EducationInstitution">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Organization"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="GovernmentDepartment"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Board">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Organization"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Center">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Organization"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Publication">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#ResearchOutput"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="ResearchOutput"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Award">
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Recognition"/>
  </owl:Class>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Recognition"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Organization"/>
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Event"/>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasResearchArea">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasFieldOfStudy">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="affiliatedWith">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#EducationInstitution"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="servesOn">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#GovernmentDepartment"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="heads">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Center"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasPublication">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Publication"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="receivedAward">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Award"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="participatedIn">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Event"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- Datatype Properties -->
  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasEmail">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>
  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasBiography">
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ChandrashekarRamanathan">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Professor"/>
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Dean"/>
    <onto:hasResearchArea rdf:resource="#DataScience"/>
    <onto:hasResearchArea rdf:resource="#SoftwareEngineering"/>
    <onto:hasResearchArea rdf:resource="#LargeScaleApplicationDevelopment"/>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#DataModeling"/>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#DataAnalytics"/>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#DatabaseDesign"/>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#SoftwareArchitecture"/>
    <onto:affiliatedWith rdf:resource="#IIITB"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#DepartmentOfEducation"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#DepartmentOfFinance"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#CenterForSmartGovernance"/>
    <onto:heads rdf:resource="#MINRO"/>
    <onto:heads rdf:resource="#CTRI-DG"/>
    <onto:hasPublication rdf:resource="#ResearchPaper1"/>
    <onto:hasPublication rdf:resource="#ResearchPaper2"/>
    <onto:receivedAward rdf:resource="#Top10DataScienceAcademiciansOfIndia2018"/>
    <onto:receivedAward rdf:resource="#Top10DataScienceAcademiciansOfIndia2019"/>
    <onto:participatedIn rdf:resource="#BITES"/>
    <onto:hasEmail rdf:resource="mailto:rc@iiitb.ac.in"/>
    <onto:hasBiography rdf:resource="Professor Chandrashekar Ramanathan is a faculty member at IIIT-B..."/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="IIITB">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#EducationInstitution"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="MINRO">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Center"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="CTRI-DG">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Center"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DepartmentOfEducation">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentDepartment"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DepartmentOfFinance">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentDepartment"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="CenterForSmartGovernance">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentDepartment"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ResearchPaper1">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Publication"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ResearchPaper2">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Publication"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Top10DataScienceAcademiciansOfIndia2018">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Award"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Top10DataScienceAcademiciansOfIndia2019">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Award"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="BITES">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Board"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DataScience">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="SoftwareEngineering">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="LargeScaleApplicationDevelopment">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DataModeling">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DataAnalytics">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DatabaseDesign">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="SoftwareArchitecture">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

</rdf:RDF>
